mapper.select: SELECT result_id , user_id , survey_id , risk_score , risk_level_code , recommendation , portfolio_suggestion , analyzed_at , valid_until , use_yn FROM tbl_survey_result WHERE result_id = #{resultId}

SELECT result_id , user_id , survey_id , risk_score , risk_level_code , recommendation , portfolio_suggestion , analyzed_at , valid_until , use_yn FROM tbl_survey_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND survey_id = #{surveyId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY analyzed_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT result_id , user_id , survey_id , risk_score , risk_level_code , recommendation , portfolio_suggestion , analyzed_at , valid_until , use_yn FROM tbl_survey_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY analyzed_at DESC
